tasks.label: Build 8051 Project (SDCC)
tasks.command: if (!(Test-Path build)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory build }; $files = (Get-ChildItem src\*.c | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }); sdcc -mmcs51 --model-small --debug -I'C:\Program Files\sdcc\include' -L'C:\Program Files\sdcc\lib' --xram-size 2048 --iram-size 256 --code-size 65536 --out-fmt-ihx $files -o build\output.ihx; Get-Content build\output.ihx | packihx | Out-File -FilePath build\output.hex -Encoding ascii
